text:
Polio & Co. Ltd. [, (Ma)Porio Bussan] is a dummy company owned by the Nostrade Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 79 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Shalnark browses the Hunter Website for information on the building Uvogin was held captive in. He learns that the building belongs to Polio & Co. Ltd., a dummy company owned by the Nostrade Family. 

Trivia

It's possible that the company name is a reference to the disease of the same name and a play on the morbid fact that Neon Nostrade is a collector of body parts.
In the 1999 anime adaptation (subtitled version), the company name is transliterated as "Polio and Company, Ltd.". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 55 (1999)
